new_arrival.send_cadence: Single launch send on arrival_date. Optional teaser 48h before for Loyalists.
new_arrival.tone_angle: Excitement and discovery — lead with story (vineyard, winemaker, vintage), not sell. No urgency clichés.
new_arrival.suppression_notes: No post-purchase suppression for this type. No fatigue override needed.

promotion.send_cadence: Day 1 launch → Day 3 reminder to non-openers → Day before expiry final send.
promotion.tone_angle: Offer-forward, then justified with story. Lead with discount code and savings amount.
promotion.suppression_notes: Suppress customers who purchased this SKU at full price in last 60 days. Apply standard 3-day fatigue guard.

limited_allocation.send_cadence: Single send to priority list. No follow-up — allocation sells itself. Auto-cancel remaining sends when stock depletes.
limited_allocation.tone_angle: Scarcity and exclusivity. Speak to the privilege of access. No discount — the rarity is the value.
limited_allocation.suppression_notes: Send to Collectors and Loyalists only. Auto-cancel queued sends when inventory depletes for the SKU.

seasonal.send_cadence: Teaser 1 week before → Launch day → Mid-period reminder → Final day urgency send.
seasonal.tone_angle: Occasion-first framing. Lead with the moment (holiday, season, occasion), then introduce the wine as the perfect complement.
seasonal.suppression_notes: Do NOT apply post-purchase suppression — seasonal campaigns use gift framing, not personal purchase targeting.

winback.send_cadence: Single send only. Never send a second winback email to the same customer within 60 days.
winback.tone_angle: Personal and low-pressure. Acknowledge the time gap. Lead with affinity — reference their preferred varietal. Soft offer if discount budget allows.
winback.suppression_notes: Target: last_purchase > 90 days, no email in last 14 days. 60-day cooldown between winback emails. Single send only.

educational.send_cadence: Single send. SEO content published independently. No urgency — evergreen value.
educational.tone_angle: Genuinely educational. Lead with the question the reader has, answer it, then connect naturally to a product. No hard sell.
educational.suppression_notes: Standard fatigue guard applies. No other suppression overrides.

bundle.send_cadence: Launch send → Day 5 reminder if no open/click. Optional: target non-openers with different subject line.
bundle.tone_angle: Value framing — show the savings vs. individual purchase. Curated angle works well: 'We put these together for a reason.'
bundle.suppression_notes: Suppress customers who already own all SKUs in the bundle. Standard 3-day fatigue guard.

pre_order.send_cadence: Announcement send → Reminder 1 week before close → Close date final send.
pre_order.tone_angle: Exclusivity and anticipation. 'Be first' framing. Detail the vintage/producer story to justify commitment before tasting.
pre_order.suppression_notes: No special suppression rules. Standard fatigue guard applies.
